subject: (no subject)
body: jp.. the drawings were supposed to include a master plan, landscaping plan, and service circulation. we had decided on a rendering of waht the vocabulary was to be. ala the morrcan house. It had images, not cad cam drawings.. the modrn house interprestation is artistic, but no informative.. please provide me eith the houses that the two firms have done asap. as we must decided how to proceed.. I will be on the island this weekend if you wouldlike to see for yourself.
body_html: jp.. the drawings were supposed to include a master plan, landscaping plan, and service circulation. we had decided on a rendering of waht the vocabulary was to be. ala the morrcan house. It had images, not cad cam drawings.. the modrn house interprestation is artistic, but no informative.. please provide me eith the houses that the two firms have done asap. as we must decided how to proceed.. I will be on the island this weekend if you wouldlike to see for yourself.
